name: ReviewTrackers Online Review Management API
what_it_does: ReviewTrackers online review management REST API for multi-location businesses to monitor, analyze, and respond to customer reviews across Google, Facebook, Yelp, TripAdvisor, and 100+ review sites with sentiment analysis and competitive benchmarking. Enables AI agents to manage review monitoring across 100+ review sites for reputation tracking automation, handle review alert and notification for real-time reputation management automation, access sentiment analysis and theme extraction for customer insight automation, retrieve competitive review benchmarking for local market intelligence automation, manage review response and escalation workflow for customer engagement automation, handle multi-location review aggregation and roll-up reporting for enterprise reputation automation, access review analytics and rating trend analysis for brand health automation, retrieve location performance comparison for multi-location management automation, manage review request campaign for proactive collection automation, and integrate ReviewTrackers with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, and CRM platforms for end-to-end reputation management automation.
use_cases: Monitoring reviews across sites from reputation management agents
Analyzing sentiment from customer insight agents
Benchmarking competitors from local market intelligence agents
Responding to reviews from customer engagement agents
not_for: Social media management beyond reviews (use Sprout Social or Hootsuite for social publishing)
Single-location small business (simpler tools like Google Business Profile suffice)
B2B vendor review management (use G2 or Capterra for software reviews)
best_when: A multi-location business, franchise, or agency wanting AI agents to automate review monitoring across 100+ sites, sentiment analysis, competitive benchmarking, and review response workflow through ReviewTrackers' enterprise reputation platform.
avoid_when: REVIEW COLLECTION FREQUENCY VARIES BY PLATFORM: ReviewTrackers collects reviews from each platform at different frequencies (Google: real-time, some directories: daily/weekly); automated reputation alerting must account for collection frequency per platform; automated real-time alert for all platforms treats hourly-scraped directories as real-time which creates false urgency or missed urgency. REVIEW RESPONSE PLATFORM AUTHENTICATION REQUIREMENT: ReviewTrackers review response via API requires active OAuth connection to each review platform (Google My Business, Facebook); automated response capability depends on maintaining active platform connections per location; expired platform OAuth creates response capability loss without obvious API error. SENTIMENT ANALYSIS ACCURACY FOR AUTOMATED ESCALATION: ReviewTrackers sentiment analysis uses NLP that may misclassify complex or nuanced reviews; automated escalation based on negative sentiment classification may trigger for sarcastic positives or ironic negatives; implement human review threshold for automated escalation workflows to avoid false alarm escalations.

auth.notes: ReviewTrackers uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Founded 2012 by Chris Campbell. Backed by Five Elms Capital ($32M+ raised). Products: Review monitoring (100+ sites), sentiment analysis, competitive benchmarking, review response, analytics. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, Slack, Google Analytics. GDPR. Serves multi-location businesses, franchises, and agencies. Competes with Birdeye, Podium, and Yext for enterprise reputation management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — demo-based enterprise sales
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing per location; minimum contract typically 10+ locations; annual contract
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. Five Elms backed. Per-location enterprise pricing. Annual contract. 10+ location minimum.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; review and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for new review, sentiment, and response events

known_agent_gotchas: LOCATION ID HIERARCHY FOR MULTI-LOCATION MANAGEMENT: ReviewTrackers organizes reviews by account → location; automated multi-location review management must maintain location ID registry; automated review aggregation must query per-location or use roll-up reporting endpoint for cross-location analytics

REVIEW PLATFORM SOURCE MAPPING FOR ROUTING: ReviewTrackers reviews include source platform field; automated review response routing may use different platforms requiring different response approaches (public Google response vs private Yelp message); automated one-size-fits-all response workflow must adapt to platform-specific response conventions

NEW REVIEW ALERT vs UPDATED REVIEW ALERT DISTINCTION: ReviewTrackers webhooks distinguish between new reviews and updated reviews (e.g., rating change after response); automated alert routing must handle both event types; automated alert that only monitors new review webhooks misses negative review updates after initial automation response

COMPETITIVE BENCHMARK DATA FRESHNESS: ReviewTrackers competitive benchmarking compares your review ratings to nearby competitors; benchmark data freshness depends on competitor review collection schedule; automated competitive reporting must document benchmark data freshness limitations; automated daily competitive reporting may show same benchmark data for multiple days

RESPONSE TEMPLATE VARIABLE POPULATION FOR PERSONALIZATION: ReviewTrackers supports response templates with variables (customer name, review site, rating); automated response generation must populate template variables from review metadata; automated template response with unpopulated variables sends literal {{customer_name}} placeholder to reviewer
agent_readiness.security_notes: Reputation management. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Review and location performance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Reputation management. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Review and customer data.
